items.title: Ministry of Coal to Launch 15th Round of Commercial Coal Mine Auctions and Organise Stakeholder Consultation on 17.04.26 in Mumbai
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Coal Ministry of Coal to Launch 15th Round of Commercial Coal Mine Auctions and Organise Stakeholder Consultation on 17.04.26 in Mumbai Posted On: 16 APR 2026 10:33AM by PIB Delhi The Ministry of Coal is set to organize a Stakeholder Consultation on “Atmanirbhar Bharat: Coal for Energy Security”, along with the launch of the 15th Round of Commercial Coal Mine …
